title: Multi-Agent Delegation, Context Minimization, Merge, and Failure Containment · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent organization supplies a different user population, task distribution, tool set, risk tier, model response, resource budget, accessibility need, and failure condition and transfers multi-agent delegation, context minimization, merge, and failure containment into a changed typed contained delegation graph. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of typed contained delegation graph with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Use delegation only when specialized context, independent work, isolation, or ownership beats a simpler function, workflow, tool, or single agent.
Define delegated goal, inputs, outputs, non-goals, authority, tools, budget, deadline, evidence, stop, and escalation in a typed contract.
Send only task-required, tenant-authorized, provenance-labeled context and never inherit parent secrets or tools implicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Delegation Fit
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab agent engineering team handles case 2116 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to delegate bounded tasks with typed contracts, minimum context, independent authority, result validation, conflict resolution, and failure containment; every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy; then replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Delegation Fit.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use delegation only when specialized context, independent work, isolation, or ownership beats a simpler function, workflow, tool, or single agent. For Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Delegation Fit, keep Delegation Fit connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Delegation Failure Containment
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-delegation-failure-containment-r5most" that uses case 2639 to delegate bounded tasks with typed contracts, minimum context, independent authority, result validation, conflict resolution, and failure containment. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Delegation Failure Containment.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Delegation Failure Containment into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Delegation Failure Containment, keep Delegation Failure Containment connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-delegation-failure-containment-r5most
# Competency: agentpy-delegation-failure-containment.
# Case 2639: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_delegation_failure_containment_r5most(delegated_tasks: int = 18, accepted_results: int = 12, rejected_results: int = 6, minimized_contexts: int = 18, cascading_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_r5most = "r5most-tsom5r-2639"
    assert evidence_variant_r5most
    evidence_axes_r5most = (
        "authorityr5most",
        "interaction2639",
        "tooltsom5r",
        "stater5most2639",
        "evaluation2639r5most",
        "recoverytsom5r2639",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_r5most)) == 6
    if delegated_tasks < 6 or accepted_results < 0 or rejected_results < 0:
        return False, delegated_tasks, "delegation-count"
    if accepted_results + rejected_results != delegated_tasks:
        return False, accepted_results, "delegation-reconciliation"
    if minimized_contexts != delegated_tasks:
        return False, minimized_contexts, "delegation-context"
    if cascading_failures > 0:
        return False, cascading_failures, "delegation-cascade"
    assert accepted_results + rejected_results == delegated_tasks and cascading_failures == 0
    return True, accepted_results, "contained-agent-delegation"
